creator: laszlo-rdr-keethu9thi@karolyi.hu
text:
There is a bug in python that causes the python process to hang upon exiting. I've spent 2 days with investigating, to arrive to the conclusion that it's present in all current python variants.

The github issue about the bug is here:
https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/102126

I'm using python3.10.10, to which this fix will come out with the next release, that is 3.10.11, around the beginning of April.

I've been hit severely by this bug on many of my servers, including CI and production servers. In the meantime, I've downgraded to 3.10.9 from the source manually, but it would be nice to get a hotfix release from 3.10.10 until the next release will arrive with the bugfix.
